title: Atay's Weapons/Traps
description: This mod contains traps ( lethal and non lethal) and Weapons/Items with abilities.
body:
LAST UPDATE FOR NEOFORGE, it was hard to maintain but ill start over again after sometime
 
**I highly recommend playing this mod with Overhaul Explosion**.

This is the first mod I've ever made, and it contains:

Weapons:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
-The Sword of Mjolnir, a powerful sword that can summon lightning where you look at. 
 There are 2 new enchant that change the lightning behaviour (death from above, annihilation)
 
![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/a6b4a720218790aec80f8c481cb4b35645acd396.png)

 -the Echo sword, the full power of the konda that got unleased. Now you can do sonic boom like the warden!
 
 ![echo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/a862e459de84a0a6c61e2a4e05c2adee2856521a.gif)

-SOS RADIO you can only have it ONCE so don't lose it (you must kill a warden to have it)          
-Warden Heart can be obtained by killing a warden and its purpose is to summon a friendly warden,if you right click with the radio (it consume the heart) or you can also craft the Echo Sword                                                                                             
 ![sos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/f49eb0f18890b23190d6305c356b877c66d0c5d4.gif)

-The Suicide Vest! its just an IED strapped to your chest and you'll need the Kill switch to detonate the Vest.
![suicide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/53b5b44e938d347b5e165f3dfb4e1c58d43f8b52.png)
</details>

Traps:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
-The IED also called improvised Explosive Device, you can use a timer (right click the IED) or redstone to detonate it. When the timer start the IED screen become RED. 
  
 ![ied](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/debc73c02c0bbddcd286c1eab41a71dd684bff27.png)

-The Land mine, you can bury it with a shovel.
 ![landmine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/c979f9cbb8a0655c98d98f80a3db4f37e3a70128.png)

-The Proximity Mine, it has 4 different modes which allow you to target different enemies ( player/monster, player only, monster only, ALL)

![Proximity Mine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8f908d1943c7e2223265ba6157d5960bf2cdacf_0.webp)

-The Bear trap, you can right click to open it if it got a mob!
 ![bear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/f9c66f085b1a1ed28218eb508e62e50d53cbe156.png)

</details>

Items/Blocks:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  -items/block:
  
- New ore called the mjolnir. If you cook it, you get the mjolnir fragment.

- New item called Wither Bone. You can craft 3 Death Powder with it.

- Death Powder is an item used to make explosifs/special items like Mjolnir or The Forbidden Fruit.

- Forbidden Fruit: You temporarily make a contract with the devil to gain more strength in exchange for your max health.

  
  ![item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/e874d4f838e880137a67054debf28188f308f2ca.png)


- [NEW] Remote Detonator — Shift-right-click an IED you own to link it. Detonate it anytime, from anywhere.

- [NEW] Void Eye — Consume Death Powder to enter a ghost phase for 30 seconds, allowing you to scout the area and detect potential threats. (not gonna lie i made this item to help myself locate Proto Hiveminds from the Spore mod.<---- i heavily recommand this mod)

![meow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ju6Y7KFA/images/9f762d23c4c73dfb0ea5437f24be442a6f7a975f.png)

</details>



# [THIS MOD NEED GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

This mod isn't perfect and was made just for me and my friend, so don't expect too much from it. I'll keep adding more content as I get better at modding.

Until then, ENJOY!!!

![meow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/934702037f5a4a04fd322e5459175c4a163fda06_0.webp)
